articles.summary: VideoRAE提出表示自编码器代替传统3D-VAE，利用视频基础模型（VFM）提取丰富语义和时空特征，改善潜在空间质量，提升生成视频的保真度与一致性。

articles.title: DPNeXt: A Lightweight Multi-Scale Feature Fusion Framework for Efficient ViT-Based Multi-Task Dense Prediction

While Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) are increasingly adopted as robust feature encoders, existing decoding strategies present a critical bottleneck. articles.summary: DPNeXt提出轻量级多尺度特征融合框架，用于基于ViT的多任务密集预测（语义分割+深度估计），通过高效解码策略降低计算开销，适用于机器人实时感知。

articles.title: Lightweight return-mapping surrogates for multiscale plasticity: a practical guide
articles.excerpt: This paper presents a practical guide to building lightweight neural-network surrogates for the plastic return-mapping process in concurrent multiscale (FE2) simulations. Rather than proposing a new architecture, we show how a deliberately simple feed-forward network, structured to mirror the classical return-mapping update, can replace the prohibitively expensive nested fine-scale solves that dominate the cost of conventional FE2 schemes based on FFT homogenization at the meso-scale. We walk th
articles.summary: 本文提供构建轻量级神经网络替代模型的实用指南，用于多尺度塑性力学中的返回映射过程。采用镜像经典算法的简单前馈网络，在FE2模拟中实现高效准确计算。

articles.title: A Statistical Formulation Gap for Nonlinear Multiscale Physics-Informed Learning
articles.excerpt: We prove a finite-sample formulation gap for physics-informed learning of nonlinear multiscale elliptic equations. For a uniformly monotone divergence-form class with coefficients oscillating at scale $ε$, we derive a finite-width, finite-sample, and finite-iteration error bound for a boundary-compatible variational neural solver. Its stability, sampling, and optimization constants are independent of $ε$, while all unresolved scale dependence is isolated in the best-approximation error. We then
articles.summary: 该文证明非线性多尺度椭圆方程物理信息学习存在有限样本公式差距。针对系数在尺度ε振荡的单调散度形式，推导了边界紧致神经网络的有限宽度、样本和迭代误差界。

articles.title: Surrogate modeling of drift-reduced Braginskii turbulence with resistivity-conditioned Koopman neural operators
articles.excerpt: Machine-learning-driven surrogate operators are developed for three-dimensional, nonlinear, flux-driven simulations of boundary plasma turbulence based on the two-fluid drift-reduced Braginskii model. articles.title: Neural operators solve inverse problems for constitutive model discovery
articles.excerpt: Characterizing the mechanical response of materials traditionally requires solving optimization problems in which model parameters are calibrated or trained to minimize the discrepancy between model predictions and experimental data.
